Hey how's it going guys on this video I'm going to be going over creating your acuity account and getting it configured for Alan. So once you're in acuity go ahead and click on the top right and click try it now and this page go ahead and just select whatever pertains to your gem here. We are going to be changing this anyways but go ahead and select that and if you would like to sync to any of your other calendars you can do that here and I'm going to go ahead and select no on this. I'm going to say no on this as well but if you are taking appointments from people in other time zones potentially you can select yes just be aware that if you do that it just require them to select time zone which is an extra step in their scheduling. So let's go ahead. The first thing we're going to do is go to scheduling page link and so let's go in here and just go ahead and change this link name and we're basically just going to be customizing this to whatever you prefer so I'm going to just I would first put like your gym name and then something like transformation or something like that. Okay and then let's do save. Alright and so that is now good so let's go ahead and go down into appointment types. Alright so let's go ahead and edit the pre-populated appointment type in here and you can name this or leave it as you will so you can either leave it as consultation or you can put challenge consultation and then just make sure that this is selected to which person this appointment is going to be routing to. So I'm just going to leave it as question for here but just to show you that. Okay and then we're going to say update appointment type. Alright and then now we're going to want to duplicate that one so let's go ahead and duplicate it and let's go back into home and then next thing we want to do is we want to go down into availability. Let's go ahead and go here and the first thing we want to do is let's go down into our calendar settings and just as a note since I added to people I have Christian and I have Susie so for everything that I'm doing right now starting from the appointment types you just need to do that again for your other person that's taking appointments so basically just repeat all these steps for Susie or whoever's taking appointments. So let's go ahead and click calendar settings now on my calendar hours here and that way basically what this does is it separates it and do two groups. So there we go and so the next thing we can do is basically so now that these are separated let's go ahead and configure these. So this is our three-day appointment and basically to explain first we're trying to get through Allen we're trying to schedule people into the three-day appointment and if they're for whatever reason if they're not able to that's when we decide to go ahead Allen will send them the six-day appointment type instead so they have more available or options to choose from. So let's go ahead and set up our three-day calendar means you have a single time so you can set this to or whatever you prefer here. Go ahead and save those limits and then we want to go into the six-day calendar and so really want to use same thing here whatever times you would prefer on here and then let's go ahead and again you can just basically paste these in as needed. So alright and then after you have that set let's go ahead and click save regular hours okay and then client scheduling limits and then go ahead and again change this to whatever you prefer and the most important thing right here is days in the future so this is our six-day calendar because it has an exclamation point so we want to do six and then however many appointments you want in one slot. Save limits awesome. One last thing if you go into the next thing we want to do is go into the appointment types and let's just go ahead and customize these URLs so let's go ahead and say let's customize the link for our three-day calendar without the exclamation point so let's just name it whatever you prefer and then you can you know if you want you can add a three at the end to signify so you know it's that three-day appointment not totally spelled that wrong that's okay and then go ahead and customize your link for your six-day as well and go ahead and name this whatever you prefer and then you can always put a six at the end so you know it's your six-day calendar awesome so now that that is set let's go back into home and so you shouldn't you want to make sure is that you are on the powerhouse player plan if you don't upgrade to this plan basically you won't be able to fully utilize the webbooks and it won't be communicating properly with Alan so it basically won't pull in your appointments and to Alan so definitely be sure to upgrade on the powerhouse plan and then after you do that you can actually I'm sure you guess not and I would recommend unchecking this because that basically it'll show them that they can schedule another appointment and we probably don't want people scheduling another appointment after scheduling one and so and then I would also not save that okay and so that is everything we need to cover and the next thing we'll be doing is just my next video is we're gonna be plugging it into Alan and on the funnel so I hope that helped and thanks for watching
